ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the drone (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "drone_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "drone_type" TEXT /* Type of the drone (e.g., consumer, commercial) */,
  "drone_weight" REAL /* Weight of the drone */,
  "drone_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the drone (e.g., 100x50x20 cm) */,
  "drone_payload_capacity" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity of the drone */,
  "last_flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the last flight */,
  "total_flight_hours" REAL /* Total flight hours of the drone */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, data analysis, administration) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone using the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., motor, sensor) */,
  "component_model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, replaced, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_components_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., crash, loss of signal) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident resolution (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was prepared */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., post-flight analysis, incident report) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report content */,
  "prepared_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who prepared the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low battery, high temperature) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight data */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., safety, privacy) */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_schedule_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES drone_components ("component_id")
)
